description.initial: The southeastern waters are where the island's influence is weakest. Here, normal ocean life thrives: fish hunt, seabirds dive, waves break unpredictably. It's chaotic and beautiful, a reminder of what waits when you finally leave this place.
description.return: The southeastern waters. Real life flourishes here, beyond the island's reach.
description.atmospheric: Chaos and change. Growth and decay. The beautiful imperfection of reality.

south.blockedMessage: The southern ocean extends beyond all horizons. Nothing lies that way.

interactables.name: Breaking Waves
interactables.examineText: Real waves breaking on real rocks. Unpredictable, powerful, alive. So different from the island's dead perfection.
